payload.description:
Async score-processor-lambda does not consistently surface dependency-backed metadata/results for parent score extraction, diverging from sync API behavior.

Scope:
- Add shared dependency-aware single-target extraction helper in plexus.utils.scoring
- Use it in score-processor-lambda handler
- Treat dependency-unmet as terminal FAILED (no retry) using ScoringJob status
- Preserve success queue payload contract
- Add focused tests for subset selection, dependency-unmet terminal handling, fallback extraction, and retry semantics for true failures
payload.title: Fix async score-processor dependency backfill handling
